feed.title: SAP Community - SAP R/3
feed.subtitle: SAP R/3 Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How can I evaluate forms in SAP?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

we would like to create an analysis of all forms in SAP that have been actively used in the last two years. Is this possible and if so, how?

Best regards

entry.title: Sequential numbers missing, Entries ignored INT.
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

While running LSMW for Customer sales area extension the Sequential numbers missing error occured.

But when manually will extend that time without

error the customer is getting extended.

Issue is coming only when I'm running LSMW.

Attaching the error screenshot.

Please anyone have any idea about this please help to resolve this issue.

Thank You

Shubham Dongre

entry.title: Entery level SAP certifications
entry.content:
Hi

Our company uses SAP R3 (Financial). I believe it is cutomized to or company needs. Users can create purchase orders to buy Goods or Services from external vendors. I am working as a tech support helping our SAP users to create purchase orders using SAP. I want to get a certificate related to what I am doing to improve my job status. I am also interested in Data Analysis in general. I would appreciate if you can tell me which "basic" certificate(s) I can try to get to help me with my career development. Thank you very much

entry.title: Need to identify Datasources based on FSCD Tables
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am looking to find out std datasources based on FSCD tables.

DFKKESR  ISR Payment Supplement
DFKKEXTTAX  Control Table for Update of External Tax Systems
DFKKIA  FI-CA: Database table for FKKIA - intrst supp
DFKKKO  Header Data in Open Item Accounting Document
DFKKKO_WF  Header Data for Contract Accting Doc. (Workflow Parameters)
DFKKLOCKS  FI-CA: Business Locks
DFKKLOCKSH  Business Lock Histories
DFKKOBJRL  Object Relations between FI-CA Documents

DFKKOPK_TEXT_GL  Text G/L Item

DFKKOPKX  Items for Contract Accounting Document (Enhancement)
DFKKOPW  Items in contract account document
DFKKOPWH  Withholding Tax Data for Business Partner Item
FKKDEFREV  Trigger Table for Deferred Revenue Postings
FKK_KONTL_LINK  Link Table: Document <> Variable Additional Account Assigmt

VVSCPOSWH  Payment Plan Item: Variable Withholding Tax Supplements
VVSCPOSICDR  Payment Plan Item: Data for ICDR Service
VVSCPOSESR  Payment Plan Item: ISR Attachment
VVSCPOSCOINS  Payment Plan Item Supplement: Coinsurance Shares
VVSCPOS  Bill Scheduling: Scheduling Item
VVSCITEMWH  Payment Plan Subitem: Variable Withholding Tax Supplements
VVSCITEM  Bill Scheduling: Scheduling Document
PPPOS_REV_DETA  Payment Plan: Reversal Table Detail Payment Plan Item
PPPOS_REV  Payment Plan: Reversal Table for Payment Plan Item
DIMAPARSCPOS  IO: Change to Scheduling Items

entry.title: System Tax issues
entry.content:
I am placing the PO through SAPBYD Buying entity is Espoo, there will be new so created in SAP , Not SAPBYD, the seller entity is US , we are having high Taxes, we need it without taxes.

Because of which all my PO’s is routed to China or Netherland , to get the material, its causing me delay.

Is there any options do we have? to do without taxes?

Note: Same company my division using SAPBYD, the bigger Division is using SAP.

entry.title: CM25 Location of Work Center not displayed the selection screen
entry.content:
Hello,

I am facing an issue while putting in the selection screen of CM25, the field 'Location'.

Goal: Fill location in the selection screen and the system selects the work center linked with the corresponding location.

First attempt: I used STORT field (Location) which already exists in structure CYFI2. I created the set through CES1 trx and then I included it in the selection profile that I use for CM25. In this case, it is being displayed there but it does not select the work centers accordingly, so I cannot display the production orders in CM25.

Second attempt: Add STAND field in structure CYFI2. Then I created a variable CEV1 and I created the set using CES1 to finally save it in my selection profile. Unfortunately, the field is not being displayed in CM25 so I cannot select it.

Do you know how to solve it or any other idea?

Thanks and Kind Regards

entry.title: How to enable Services for now object button (GOC) in IQ03 tcode?
entry.content: How to enable Services for now object button (GOC) in IQ03 tcode?

entry.title: Enable Now Analytics on Published vs. Unpublished Content
entry.content:
Does Enable Now offer analytics on Published content in a workarea or by workarea?

Looking for count by Workarea, object type.

Thank you.

Leticia Urrutia

entry.title: sale order.
entry.content:
I have 4 materials in sale order. While creating delivery only 2 materials are fetching in delivery document. Any solution for this?? I have checked shipping point determination, material master, stock. Everything is correct.

Regards,

Lokesh.

entry.title: Sub contract order for ROH Account 202600 requires an assignment to a CO object
entry.content:
Hi Experts, I hope you can help. I have a request from the business to allow subcontracting for ROH materials. HALBS already work. I have set to F and 30 in MM, created a BOM for the raw material (I know, but it's what they want), created a subcontract Info record but when I come to receipt the material via MIGO the message

Account 202600 requires an assignment to a CO object. How do I configure to select the ccount and CC I want automatically?

Thanks

Johnny

entry.title: VKN Turkey: where to enter in customer master data?
entry.content:
Hi,

we just starting with e-invoicing in Turkey.
right now, we are looking to the corresponding field in customer master data (table KNA1).
Can tax code1 used?
Number is accepted at time of entering in this field.

entry.title: VA01/VA02/VA03 button icons missing
entry.content:
On our DEV system, the icons have disappeared last week from VA01/VA02/VA03.

This seems a system wide change, as this happened for everyone.

Our QA and PRD systems still have the icons.

VA01

VA02

entry.title: error Simplification List for SAP S/4HANA 2023
entry.content:
DEAR EXPERT

I HAVE THIS ERROR IN SIMPLIFICATION LIST (/SDF/RC_START_CHECK) IN CONVERSION FROM ECC TO SAP S/4HANA 2023

Check-sub-ID: FI_AA_CUST_DEPRAREA_CURRENCY

E:ACC_AA:173 50 BMIT

IN THE NOTE 2618023 I DIDN'T FIND THE PROCEDURE TO CORRECT THE ERROR

CAN YOU HELP ME TO SOLVE THIS ERROR?

MANY THANKS

REGARDS

entry.title: CM25 Default time scale -1 day
entry.content:
Hello,

Is there any way to set -1 day per default when you run CM25? In all profiles, it opens up to today's date and today's time per default.Then, you can adjust manually the position on time scale. In this case, I would like to do it automatically.

Have not seen an option in customizing, but not sure if I am missing something.

Kind Regards

entry.title: ABAP Runtime Error MESSAGE_TYPE_X
entry.content:
While Doing Production punching in MFBF.We are getting dump. but is only for some specific material.

Could you please let me know as to why this error is caused and how it can be rectified .

Dump: ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Category ABAP Programming Error

Runtime Errors MESSAGE_TYPE_X

ABAP Program SAPLBARM

Application Component PP-REM

Date and Time 09.12.2023 14:58:31

Pls find the dump attachment . abap-mfbf-dump.txt

entry.title: Fields does not exist on the screen SAPMF40K3 02204
entry.content:
Colleagues good day!

We have an issue only for 1 user during Manual Bank Statement uploading.

User opens tcode ZHRU_FITR_0004 -> choose excel file from shared folder -> excecute

As a resault recieve an error 1 - Error in output file

We tried to save filve to local PC and repeat all steps.

In this scenario user recieve Fields does not exist on the screen SAPMF40K3 02204 error (BDC 349)

It can be script error BUT it affects only one user - colleagues with the same roles, profiles, parameteres, security configurations run tcode correctly without any errors.

In SU53 we see - S_ADMI_FCD - F4MX. But there's no any sense as I mentioned colleagues with the same authorizations run it correctlyerror-1.jpgerror2.png

Does someone have any ideas what it can be?

entry.title: SAP R3 ver 770 - Select/copy/paste
entry.content:
Hi

We use SAP R3 Procurement to create purchase orders. Sometime the page has multiple line items. and to go to the end I need to use the scroll arrow, so not all items are shown unless I scroll down. If I want to select this page and paste it in Excel for example, SAP will only allow me to select what I see, if I want to select the lines at the end of the page then I need to scroll down and then select the reset. So I will have to do it in 2 steps. How can I do that in one step? I wish I can use CTRL + A to select everything but that not possible in SAP. Thank you very much,

entry.title: latest updated ratios for Exchange rate type M
entry.content:
Dear Friends,

Here is the user requirement.

latest updated ratios for Exchange rate type M.

where can i find the information? i am working in ECC 6.0.

Please mention the t.code and table , so that i can be sent to the user.

Regards

Sridhar

entry.title: R/3 undeleting lines
entry.content:
Hello,

 

When undelelting lines on a PO but cannot progress due to 'PR alr ordered in full' What is the procedure to get relevant lines back on the PO and save it?

entry.title: Shipping to Vendor for repair and return
entry.content:
Hi, How can we send the material to vendor(Non SAP user) for repair and return.

Currently i am using ZLO(Offline process) which does not show equipment movement in SAP and the status shows the equipment still at my plant whereas i have moved it to vendor for repair. Upon receipt of the physical equipment back to my plant, we are performing stock return process in SAP and bringing the equipment to inventory stock.

I am looking for brief transaction movement or process to move the equipment to vendor in SAP, and later need to receive it in my plant's active stock upon physical receipt from the vendor.
